# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: sidecar-proxy
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # Use this to select the Istio Ingress gateway for this service mesh, which will be used by default if not specified.
---  
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: sidecar-proxy
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*" # This matches all pods in the same namespace as this virtual service, so it'll be accessible from any location within that namespace if not specified otherwise.
  gateways:  
    - istio:ingressgateway    
  http:      
      - route:          
          - destination:        
              host: "*" # This matches all pods in the same service as this virtual service, so it'll be accessible from any location within that namespace if not specified otherwise.  
            port:                
                number: 80            
        weight:                  1          
    - route:                    
      - destination:          # This matches all pods in the same network as this virtual service, so it'll be accessible from any location within that namespace if not specified otherwise.  
         host: "*"              
       port:                   
            number: 5001          
        weight:                  2   
---    
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
 name: sidecar-proxy      # This matches the VirtualService's metadata, so it will be used by default if not specified otherwise in a more specific way below  
spec: 
 host: "*"                # Matches all pods within this namespace. If you specify other hosts here then only those services are accessible from that location and port unless overridden elsewhere    
 subsets:                 
    - name: v1           
      labels:             
        version:             v1  
       ports:              
         - number: 80-90 # Ports can be set to a range of numbers. If not specified, the default is all port ranges defined in Istio's defaults and overrides    
    - name: v2           
      labels:             
        version:             v2  
       ports:              
         - number: 90-100 # Ports can be set to a range of numbers. If not specified, the default is all port ranges defined in Istio's defaults and overrides
